subject: We've received your application to Acme Corp
bodyExcerpt: Hi Jane, thank you for applying to the Senior Product Manager position at Acme Corp! We've received your application and our team will review it shortly. You'll hear back from us within 2 weeks. - The Acme Corp Recruiting Team (powered by Greenhouse)
notes: Greenhouse 'application received' confirmation — contains 'thank you for' but NOT 'thank you for your interest'. Must NOT classify as rejection. Pitfall #4 + #5 fence: if the 0.80 rejection regex broadens to match 'thank you for' alone, this test fires.
